# Bar (excluded template)

This note lives under `templates/` — EXCLUDED from the scan set. It carries a
broken wikilink AND a C6-bloat index row that WOULD flag if scanned, but the
build-dir exclusion skips it. It MUST still appear in the resolution index
(all_md is unfiltered), so the `[[bar]]` link from `link-into-templates.md`
resolves clean.
